card.name: Troll Bombed
card.text: Troll Bombed deals 2 damage to any target.

card.name: The D6
card.text: {T}: The next time target player would roll one or more dice this turn, instead they roll that many dice plus one and you choose one of those rolls to ignore. {2}, {T}, Discard a card: Draw a card. {4}, {T}, Discard an artifact card: Reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal an artifact card. Put that card into your hand and the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

card.name: Isaac Moriah
card.text: Starting item—The D6 (When this creature enters, you may search your library and/or graveyard for The D6. If you searched your library this way, shuffle.) Whenever an artifact you control enters, put a +1/+1 counter on Isaac. This ability only triggers once each turn.

card.name: Box of Friends
card.text: {T}: Populate. The token created this way gains haste. Sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step. (To populate, create a token that's a copy of a creature token you control.) {5}{R}, {T}: For each creature token you control, create a token that's a copy of it. Each token created this way gains haste. Sacrifice them at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: Boss Rush
card.text: Whenever you cast a Boss spell, reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal a Boss card. Put that card into your hand and the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order. Boss spells you cast cost {3} less to cast. At the beginning of the end step, sacrifice this enchantment.

card.name: Lilith, Motherly Demon
card.text: Starting item—Box of Friends When Lilith enters, create a 1/1 black Demon creature token. {BR}, {T}: Another target creature you control gets +X/+0 until end of turn, where X is the number of Demons you control.

card.name: D-Infinity
card.text: {4}, {T}: Choose one, X is the result of the die rolled. • Roll a d4. You draw X cards. • Roll a d6. You create X Key tokens. • Roll a d8. You create X Treasure tokens. • Roll a d10. Put X +1/+1 counters on a creature you control. • Roll a d12. You gain X life.

card.name: Key TBI
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Tap or untap target nonland permanent. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Delirium of Memories
card.text: As Delirium enters or attacks, exile a creature card from a graveyard with a memory counter on it. Then it becomes a copy of a random creature card in exile with a memory counter on it except it's 7/7, is a Boss in addition to its other types, and has this ability.
